meta.title: Free Online Resume Builder | Create Your CV with AI
meta.description: Create your free resume online with artificial intelligence. Fast and easy CV creation: professional templates, ATS optimization, PDF export. Build your resume in 5 minutes.

hero.title: Create your free resume online
hero.subtitle: with artificial intelligence
hero.description: Building a resume has never been easier. Our free AI-powered resume builder helps you create a professional CV in 5 minutes: modern templates, ATS optimization and PDF export.

stats.madeIn: Made in Rennes by Evan Davison

features.title: How to build a professional resume easily
features.subtitle: All the tools to create, write and optimize your resume — free

ai.title: AI Suggestions
ai.description: Our AI analyzes your content and suggests improvements to make your resume more impactful. Rephrasing, keywords, optimized structure.

ats.title: ATS Score
ats.description: Optimize your resume for automatic screening systems.

templates.description: Modern designs tailored to your industry.

meta.title: Free Resume Templates | Professional CV Templates Online
meta.description: Discover our free professional resume templates: Modern, Classic, ATS-Friendly, Minimal and Creative. Choose the perfect design to create your resume online.

meta.title: How to Write a Resume in 2026 | Complete Guide
meta.description: How to write a resume? A complete and free guide to creating a professional resume: structure, tips, examples and templates. Learn how to write a resume that lands interviews.
